name: 404-redirect
description: Client-side old-URL to new-URL redirector for post-renewal 404 pages.
author: Hiroki Minematsu

scripts.fetch:sqljs: cp node_modules/sql.js/dist/sql-wasm.js redirects/sql-wasm.js && cp node_modules/sql.js/dist/sql-wasm.wasm redirects/sql-wasm.wasm
scripts.build: npm run build:sqlite && npm run fetch:sqljs
